{"title":"","content":[[{"tag":"text","text":"GMC中有关必须包含必要的contact us信息在网站上以确保通过审核的规定：","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"首先，GMC通过审核需要填写明确的customer support information：","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"原文链接：","style":[]},{"tag":"a","href":"https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/13661344?hl=en-IE&sjid=9687526408823018317-NC","text":"https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/13661344?hl=en-IE&sjid=9687526408823018317-NC","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"原文截图：","style":[]},{"tag":"img","image_key":"img_v3_02ul_7be31ba7-40b7-4090-8345-9b325af5a36g","width":2454,"height":1502},{"tag":"text","text":"第二，GMC help center中也明确要求，至少确保如下一项在网站中明确标识：A Contact Us form, a link to your business profile on social media, an email address or phone number.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"原文表述：Make your contact information clearly available on your website. Examples:","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"A Contact Us form, a link to your business profile on social media, an email address or phone number.","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"链接：","style":[]},{"tag":"a","href":"https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/12756116?hl=en&utm_source=chatgpt.com&visit_id=639059427131219690-1844103584&rd=1","text":"https://support.google.com/merchants/answer/12756116?hl=en&utm_source=chatgpt.com&visit_id=639059427131219690-1844103584&rd=1","style":[]},{"tag":"img","image_key":"img_v3_02ul_a4012e76-0981-499d-b3a5-2c8fdddbc8eg","width":2690,"height":1526},{"tag":"text","text":"根据我们实际经验，初次审核GMC时，至少有2项以及以上的联系信息清晰、明确的展示在网站，可以有效的减少GMC被拒绝的概率。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"当我们仅仅填写一项联系方式时，GMC审核会出现明显的驳回提示：","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":" ","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Your account is suspended because valid contact information is missing — show at least one of the following: business address, phone number, email, contact form, social media business profile.","style":["italic"]}]]}

text:
@_user_1 
结论：面试不通过。已加微信，可以作为储备资源。但是初步问了一下，候选人不太能接受兼职和远程。就想找全职。

优势：
1. 理解乙方角色
2. 投放前调研竞品投放情况：素材、人群、素材等。
3. 根据调研结果生成数据预估和投放方案，并且主动拆解分阶段的投放目标
劣势：
1. 目前对接的客户不给GA4权限，虽然对怎么用GA4是知道逻辑的，但是没有过多的GA4赋能广告投放的实操经验。
2. 目前接手的客户行业集中在游戏类，核心优化指标为CPA。且FB投放预算占80%+，GG投放预算较少。
3. 离职原因为裁员，服务的客户涉及灰产，投放团队被砍掉只剩下1/3。加上候选人本身在杭州，公司总部在北京。

期望薪资：22K/月（底薪）。上家公司是底薪+绩效提成，平均每月可以拿到18-19/K每月，底薪17/18K每月。
